svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 1000px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #111827;
display: inline-block; font-size: 30px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#111827, #d4dae7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 94px; margin-left: 366px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #166534;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#166534, #75b98f); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 图像获取与检测阶段

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 184px; margin-left: 1096px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1d4ed8;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1d4ed8, #81abff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 三维恢复与状态输出阶段

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(148, 163, 184), rgb(87, 100, 118));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 598px; height: 1px; padding-top: 182px; margin-left: 326px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
0. 环境调用视觉状态估计
_get_obs() 中检测到 use_visual_object_state=True
进入 _get_visual_object_state()

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 303px; margin-left: 366px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. 从 base 相机渲染 RGB-D
rgb_img = render("rgb_array", camera_name="base")
depth_img = render("depth_array", camera_name="base")

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 445px; margin-left: 366px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. 深度缓冲转换为米制深度
depth_img = Dcmm.depth_2_meters(depth_img)
消除 MuJoCo depth buffer 0~1 非线性表示

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 585px; margin-left: 366px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. 红色目标检测
RedObjectDetector.detect(rgb_image)
HSV 阈值分割 + 开闭运算 + 最大轮廓筛选

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 740px; margin-left: 461px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 检测结果是否有效？

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 242, 242), rgb(35, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 348px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1053px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
返回 fallback 状态
若 last_valid 存在则复用上一次结果
否则返回全零 world_pos3d / world_v_lin_3d

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(236, 253, 245), rgb(13, 27, 21)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(22, 163, 74), rgb(39, 160, 83));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 913px; margin-left: 551px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
4. 统计目标区域深度
masked_depth_stat(depth_image, mask)
只保留 min_depth~max_depth 内的有效像素，取中位数深度

path.style: stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1326px; margin-left: 860px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1325px; margin-left: 461px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: 深度是否有效？

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 277px; margin-left: 1096px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
5. 提取像素中心
u, v = det["centroid"]
作为目标在图像平面的二维位置

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 435px; margin-left: 1096px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
6. 深度反投影到世界坐标
pixel_to_world(dcmm, u, v, depth, camera_name="base")
得到 world_pos3d

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 583px; margin-left: 1096px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
7. 3D 跟踪与速度估计
GravityKalman3D.update(world_pos3d, timestamp)
状态 [x,y,z,vx,vy,vz]，带重力先验并融合位置差分速度

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 735px; margin-left: 1096px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
8. 生成视觉估计结果
valid=True，保存 world_pos3d、world_v_lin_3d、depth、pixel
并更新 last_valid 缓存

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(239, 246, 255), rgb(21, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(37, 99, 235), rgb(105, 158, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 880px; margin-left: 1096px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
9. 转成 PPO 需要的相对状态
world_pos_to_relative_object_pos3d()
world_vel_to_relative_object_v_lin_3d()

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(254, 242, 242), rgb(35, 25, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(220, 38, 38), rgb(255, 138, 138));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1465px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
10. 失败分支处理（当前正式配置）
fallback_to_ground_truth=False
若视觉失败，则 pos3d 和 v_lin_3d 直接返回零向量

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 251, 235), rgb(25, 22, 8)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(217, 119, 6), rgb(197, 113, 16));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 328px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1100px; margin-left: 1201px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
use_visual_object_velocity
是否为 True？

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 358px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1364px; margin-left: 1301px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
11A. 输出视觉位置 + 视觉速度
object.pos3d = visual pos3d
object.v_lin_3d = visual v_lin_3d

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(243, 244, 246), rgb(26, 27, 28)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(156, 163, 175), rgb(92, 98, 108));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 318px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1364px; margin-left: 971px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
11B. 仅输出视觉位置
object.pos3d = visual pos3d
object.v_lin_3d = 0 向量

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(59, 130, 246), rgb(76, 137, 236));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 518px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1540px; margin-left: 1071px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
12. 写入 PPO 观测
在 _get_obs() 中把 object.pos3d / object.v_lin_3d
拼进状态向量，供 Actor-Critic 使用

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 346px; height: 1px; padding-top: 89px; margin-left: 1174px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
当前正式训练配置
camera_name = "base"
use_visual_object_state = True
use_visual_object_velocity = True
fallback_to_ground_truth = False

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(250, 250, 250), rgb(22, 22, 22)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 246px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1128px; margin-left: 1564px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 19px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
核心源码
visual_state_estimator.py
detector.py
depth_projector.py
tracker3d.py
DcmmVecEnv.py

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
